policies.name: Research agent · low-risk Sepolia swaps
policies.budget_summary: 1 ETH/day per-agent · 0.5 ETH/week per-vendor · 50 ETH/month global
policies.description: Allows swap intents on Sepolia testnet up to 1 ETH per agent per day. Default-deny on chain mismatch. Bundled with the SBO3L starter examples; battle-tested against the production-shaped runner.

policies.name: KeeperHub workflow strict guard
policies.reputation_basis: KH live workflow m4t4cnpmhv8qquce3bv3c — 8/8 adversarial inputs fail-closed
policies.description: Production-shaped policy for KeeperHub workflow execution. Allows only the agent's own pre-registered workflows; rejects unknown executionId prefixes. Used by the bounty submission live evidence.

policies.name: Uniswap Universal Router · per-step guards
policies.budget_summary: Per-step amount cap · slippage tolerance · token-allowlist gate
policies.reputation_basis: T-5-2 #171 — every UR command guarded by SBO3L policy decision before broadcast
policies.description: Wraps the Uniswap Universal Router with per-step policy gates. Each command (V3_SWAP_EXACT_IN, PERMIT2_TRANSFER_FROM, etc.) gets its own SBO3L decision before broadcast; deny on any step rolls the whole transaction back.

policies.name: ENS subname issuance · Trust DNS fleet
policies.budget_summary: 60 subnames/month total · 1 per agent per registration
policies.description: Allows agents to issue ENS subnames under sbo3lagent.eth via direct Registry setSubnodeRecord. Caps fleet growth; enforces unique-prefix policy.

policies.name: LangChain research agent · strict tool gate
policies.description: Community-authored policy for LangChain research agents. Allows web-search + read-only tools; denies write/execute/file-system tools. Demonstrates the third-party authoring path.
